strings.identity_verified: Your identity has been verified. I can now help you with your account.
strings.verification_required: For your security, we need to verify your identity first.
strings.account_locked: For security reasons, your account has been temporarily locked after multiple failed verification attempts. Please try again in 24 hours or visit an Apple Store with a valid ID.
strings.issue_resolved: Your account issue has been resolved. Is there anything else I can help you with?
